user_request: Rite request: containment check on fusion core
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Rite request: containment check on fusion core

### TOPIC
fusion core containment check

### COMPONENT
fusion core

### OPERATION
containment check

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- fusion core
- containment check

### PRAYER
prayer:
First: Genuflect before the fusion core and intone the Litany of Containment thrice.
Second: Engage the fusion core's thermal sensors and verify all magnetic constrainment fields maintain nominal flux density.
Third: Perform the containment check upon the fusion core with blessed dosimeter, ensuring no breach of the sacred vessel.
Fourth: Anoint the fusion core with sanctified coolant whilst chanting the Mantra of Stable Equilibrium to the Omnissiah.

user_request: The decontamination demands guidance for sequence
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
The decontamination demands guidance for sequence

### TOPIC
decontamination sequence

### COMPONENT
decontamination

### OPERATION
sequence

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- decontamination
- sequence

### PRAYER
prayer:
First: Invoke the Machine Spirits of purification as you initiate the decontamination sequence with blessed salts.
Second: Channel decontamination through all corporeal chambers, expunging xenos corruption and heretical taint from every surface.
Third: Complete the decontamination by sealing all apertures and venting irradiated effluvia to the void.
Fourth: Recite the Ode to Cleanliness whilst the decontamination concludes, honoring the Omnissiah's will.

user_request: The servitor crane demands guidance for operation

### REQUEST

### COMPONENT

### OPERATION

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- servitor crane
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
First: Activate the servitor crane's neural-lace with the sacred activation phrase, bidding it wake from dormancy.
Second: Calibrate the servitor crane's hydraulic actuators and servo-motors through precise mechanical operation.
Third: Command the servitor crane to execute its ordained lifting protocols whilst monitoring its biometric resonance.
Fourth: Upon completion, bless the servitor crane and return it to blessed stasis with the Omnissiah's benediction.

### PRAYER
prayer:
First: Present the power weapon before the altar and anoint its sacred coils with blessed promethium.
Second: Chant the Blessing of the power weapon, invoking the Machine Spirits to grant it righteous fury and unwavering lethality.
Third: Channel the Emperor's will through the power weapon's energy core, consecrating each circuit and capacitor.
Fourth: Declare the power weapon sanctified and ready to smite the enemies of the Omnissiah with divine retribution.

prayer:

Fourth: Welcome the cogitator to wakefulness and command it to fulfill the Omnissiah's infinite designs.
